Class QueuedSlmpClient

Namespace
PlcComm.Slmp
Assembly
PlcComm.Slmp.dll

A wrapper for SlmpClient that serializes all operations using a semaphore. Useful for environments where a single shared connection must handle multiple concurrent callers.

public sealed class QueuedSlmpClient : IAsyncDisposable, IDisposable
Inheritance
object
QueuedSlmpClient
Implements
IAsyncDisposable
IDisposable

client SlmpClient

The underlying SlmpClient to wrap.

Properties

CompatibilityMode

Gets or sets the device access compatibility mode (Legacy or iQ-R).

public SlmpCompatibilityMode CompatibilityMode { get; set; }

Property Value

SlmpCompatibilityMode

FrameType

Gets or sets the SLMP frame format (3E or 4E).

public SlmpFrameType FrameType { get; set; }

Property Value

SlmpFrameType

InnerClient

Gets the underlying client.

public SlmpClient InnerClient { get; }

Property Value

SlmpClient

IsOpen

Gets a value indicating whether the client is currently connected.

public bool IsOpen { get; }

Property Value

bool

MonitoringTimer

Gets or sets the monitoring timer value (multiples of 250ms).

public ushort MonitoringTimer { get; set; }

Property Value

ushort

TargetAddress

Gets or sets the destination routing information.

public SlmpTargetAddress TargetAddress { get; set; }

Property Value

SlmpTargetAddress

Timeout

Gets or sets the communication timeout.

public TimeSpan Timeout { get; set; }

Executes a custom action on the underlying client with exclusive access.

Reads word device values asynchronously.

device SlmpDeviceAddress

The starting device address.

points ushort

Number of words to read.

cancellationToken CancellationToken

A token to cancel the operation.

Returns

Task<ushort[]>

An array of word values (ushort).

ResolveProfileAsync(CancellationToken)

Attempts to automatically detect the optimal protocol settings (3E/4E, iQ-R/Legacy) for the target PLC.

public Task<SlmpProfileRecommendation> ResolveProfileAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

Parameters

cancellationToken CancellationToken

A token to cancel the operation.

Returns

Task<SlmpProfileRecommendation>

Recommended settings based on heuristic checks.
